channel.title: VB Bingo News
channel.description: Latest cricket, tech, and social media news updates from VB Bingo

item.title: iPhone 18 Launch Date, Specs & Features (2027 Expected)
item.description: iPhone 18 expected launch date, specs, A20 chip, RAM, display and features. Know everything about Apple iPhone 18 base model launching in 2027.

item.title: Mitchell Santner Ruled Out of IPL 2026 | Keshav Maharaj Replacement
item.description: Mumbai Indians all-rounder Mitchell Santner ruled out of IPL 2026 due to injury. Keshav Maharaj joins as replacement. Full details here.

item.title: PBKS Chase 265 vs DC | Highest IPL Run Chase | Match 35 IPL 2026
item.description: In one of the greatest matches in IPL history, Punjab Kings pulled off a sensational chase of 265 runs against Delhi Capitals in Match 35 of IPL 2026. PBKS successfully chased 265/4 in 18.5 overs, registering the highest successful run chase in IPL history.

item.title: KL Rahul 152 vs Punjab Kings | First Indian 150 in IPL History
item.description: KL Rahul 152, IPL 2026, DC vs PBKS, first Indian 150 IPL, KL Rahul century, IPL records. He became the first Indian to score 150+ in IPL history as Delhi Capitals posted 264/2.

item.title: Ayush Mhatre Hamstring Injury Update: CSK Star Likely Out for 3 Weeks in IPL 2026
item.description: Ayush Mhatre hamstring injury update: CSK youngster likely to miss 3 weeks in IPL 2026 after suffering a hamstring tear. Check recovery time, team impact, and latest news.

item.title: MS Dhoni Suffers Calf Injury, Set to Miss IPL 2026 Matches Until April
item.description: MS Dhoni is likely to miss the early matches of IPL 2026 due to a calf injury. Check Chennai Super Kings impact, recovery timeline, and latest updates.

item.title: Instagram New Update April 2026
item.description: Explore the best Instagram video downloader tools in 2026 to save reels, stories, and videos in HD without watermark.

item.title: Cloudflare Server Outage
item.description: Cloudflare outage impacts multiple websites worldwide. Full details and updates.
